EDUTRUST CRITERION 5

Criterion 5 · Academic Systems and Processes

Module readiness-Topics + criteria

Available sources-Permission-aware

5.1.1

Course Design & Development Command Centre

UCC terms: Program = Course, Course = Module.

Proposal approval-Approved / total
Module completeness-5 evidence areas
Review approval-Approved / total
SSG coverage-Approval date present
Zero-evidence modules-All 5 areas empty
Overdue reviews-Next review date passed

Overall Evidence Radar

Immediate Attention

Course → Module Network

Course (ERPNext Program)Module (ERPNext Course)Lines show Course-to-Module membership.Click a Course node to focus its Modules. Scroll to zoom, drag to pan.

Light = lower evidence coverage; dark = higher coverageBubble size = number of populated evidence areas/rowsEach bubble = one Module (ERPNext Course)

Review Status Ring

Review Timeline

Course Review Evidence

ReviewCourseReview dateReview statusRecommendationsAction plan

Gap Severity

SeverityGap count

Gap Distribution by Record Type

Record typeGap count

Evidence Gap Records

RecordTypeAreaIssueSeverity

How to read 5.1.1

This dashboard checks whether UCC can demonstrate that each Course and Module was designed, approved, delivered with documented evidence, and periodically reviewed.

Course
UCC display term for ERPNext Program.
Module
UCC display term for ERPNext Course.
Evidence
A populated field, child table, approval, review record, or linked document that supports an EduTrust requirement.
Evidence gap
A required or expected evidence item that is empty, missing, overdue, or cannot be confirmed from an available DocType.

Status meanings

Good
The check met the configured rule for the selected scope.
Warning
Evidence exists but is incomplete, pending, or needs manual confirmation.
Risk
Evidence is missing, overdue, or falls below the configured rule.
Unavailable
The dashboard could not confirm a readable source. This is not the same as zero records.

Subpage definitions

Proposal
Checks Course Proposal rationale, learner profile, pedagogy, curriculum, assessment, risks/resources, approvals, decision dates, and SSG approval date.
Module Design
Checks Module learning outcomes, lesson plans, teaching approach, assessment criteria, and resources.
Course Review
Checks review status, review dates, recommendations, next review date, and action-plan progress.
Evidence Gaps
Combines missing or incomplete proposal, module-design, and review evidence into one follow-up list.

How to verify a result

  1. Open the relevant Q&A row.
  2. Use the DocType link in the Source column.
  3. Apply the same Course, Module, Academic Year, or date filters shown at the top.
  4. Open individual records from the dashboard tables or affected-record dialog.
  5. Confirm the exact fields listed in the source description.

Important: dashboard labels use UCC terminology, but source links retain the original ERPNext DocType names.

Primary source DocTypes

Program list ↗UCC CourseCourse list ↗UCC ModuleCourse Proposal list ↗Course Review list ↗Assessment Plan list ↗Academic Year list ↗
5.1.2

Course Review Command Centre

Module and Course Review coverage, status, evidence and improvement follow-up.

Module reviews-
Approved module reviews-
Course reviews-
Overdue course reviews-

Review Level Coverage

Review levelRecords

Next Review Schedule

Schedule stateRecords

Module Review Status

StatusRecords

Course Review Status

StatusRecords

Review Type

Review typeRecords

Action Plan Status

StatusActions

Previous Recommendation Implementation

Implementation statusRecords

Module Review Evidence Completeness

Evidence stateRecords

Review Records

RecordLevelCourseModuleDateStatusOpen

Management Questions and Data-Based Answers

CriterionQuestionAnswerSource / CalculationStatus
5.1.2

Expanded Course Review analytics

Expanded operational checks in platform v1.7.0. Click chart values to inspect underlying records.

Review-cycle status

Upcoming, due, overdue, completed, and missing-next-date review records.

Status / resultCount

Module Review to Course Review coverage

Compares reviewed modules with available course-level reviews.

Status / resultCount

Action-plan aging

Groups open actions by age where an action date or deadline exists.

Status / resultCount

Completed versus pending actions

Uses action-plan status values from Course Review records.

Status / resultCount

Missing review evidence

Shows reviews missing next date, stakeholder feedback, or benchmarking evidence.

Status / resultCount

Implementation follow-up trend

Groups implementation outcomes by review month.

Status / resultCount

How to read 5.1.2

This dashboard checks whether UCC can demonstrate that Module Reviews and Course Reviews are completed, supported by evidence, approved where required, and followed through with documented improvement actions.

Course
UCC display term for ERPNext Program.
Module
UCC display term for ERPNext Course.
Module Review
Operational review of one delivered Module, including teaching, assessment, attendance, results, observations, risks, resources, surveys, interventions and recommendations.
Course Review
Course-level review consolidating Module Reviews, stakeholder feedback, recommendations and action plans.
Evidence gap
A required review input, date, recommendation, action or supporting record that is missing, overdue or cannot be confirmed.

Status meanings

Good
The check met the configured rule for the selected scope.
Warning
Evidence exists but is incomplete, pending or needs manual confirmation.
Risk
Evidence is missing, overdue or falls below the configured rule.
Unavailable
The dashboard could not confirm a readable source. This is not the same as zero records.

Subpage definitions

Summary
Shows review coverage, overall record counts and the next-review schedule.
Review Status
Shows review status, action-plan progress, recommendation implementation and evidence completeness.
Records
Lists the underlying Module Review and Course Review documents.
Questions
Answers management questions using the selected review records.

How to verify a result

  1. Open the relevant Q&A row, chart Table view or record list.
  2. Use the DocType link in the Source column.
  3. Apply the same Course, Module, Academic Year or date filters.
  4. Open individual records and confirm the fields named in the source description.

Important: dashboard labels use UCC terminology, while source links retain ERPNext DocType names.

Primary source DocTypes

Program list ↗UCC CourseCourse list ↗UCC ModuleModule Review list ↗Course Review list ↗Academic Year list ↗

Scheduled Classes by Course

Delivery Controls

ControlValue

Attendance Status

Enrollment by Course

When a module class is selected, enrollment remains a programme/course proxy because Course Enrollment has no student_group field.

Management Questions and Data-Based Answers

CriterionQuestionAnswerSource / CalculationStatus
5.2.1

Course Planning Command Centre

Intake, module-class, timetable, Teacher and admission readiness.

Intakes-
Module classes-
Scheduled sessions-
Shortlisted applicants-

Intake Readiness

ReadinessRecords

Planning Flow Coverage

Planning stageRecords

Module Class Status

StatusRecords

Schedule Coverage

MeasureRecords

Admission Status

StatusRecords

Teacher Assignment

Assignment stateRecords

Room and Timing Readiness

Session stateRecords

Contract Date Completeness

Contract stateRecords

Planning Exceptions

RecordSourceIssueOpen

Management Questions and Data-Based Answers

CriterionQuestionAnswerSource / CalculationStatus
5.2.1

Expanded Course Planning analytics

Expanded operational checks in platform v1.7.0. Click chart values to inspect underlying records.

Intake date completeness

Checks intake start and end dates.

Status / resultCount

Module classes without schedules

Compares Module Class Details against Course Schedule.

Status / resultCount

Schedule completeness

Checks Teacher, room, start time, and end time.

Status / resultCount

Room and time clashes

Finds overlapping sessions in the same room.

Status / resultCount

Teacher timetable clashes

Finds overlapping sessions assigned to the same Teacher.

Status / resultCount

Contract versus commencement

Compares contract dates with the linked intake or commencement date.

Status / resultCount

Unsigned or unsent contracts

Uses available signature and sent-status fields; reports unsupported fields clearly.

Status / resultCount

How to read 5.2.1

This dashboard checks whether UCC can demonstrate that each Intake No, Module Class, timetable, Teacher assignment, room, contract and commencement plan is prepared before delivery begins.

Course
UCC display term for ERPNext Program.
Module
UCC display term for ERPNext Course.
Module Class
Operational class record connecting Course, Module, Intake No, Teacher, schedule and readiness evidence.
Module Schedule
UCC display term for the ERPNext Course Schedule DocType.
Planning gap
A missing or unconfirmed date, Teacher assignment, room, timetable, contract or readable source.

Status meanings

Good
The check met the configured rule for the selected scope.
Warning
Evidence exists but is incomplete, pending or needs manual confirmation.
Risk
Evidence is missing, overdue or falls below the configured rule.
Unavailable
The dashboard could not confirm a readable source. This is not the same as zero records.

Subpage definitions

Summary
Shows Intake No, Module Class, schedule and admissions readiness at a high level.
Readiness
Checks Teacher assignment, session timing, room, timetable and contract completeness.
Exceptions
Lists planning records that are incomplete, unavailable or need follow-up.
Questions
Answers management questions using current planning data.

How to verify a result

  1. Open the relevant question, chart Table view or exception.
  2. Use the DocType link in the Source column.
  3. Apply the same Course, Module Class, Academic Year or date filters.
  4. Confirm the schedule and readiness fields in the linked ERPNext record.

Important: dashboard labels use UCC terminology, while source links retain ERPNext DocType names.

Primary source DocTypes

Program list ↗UCC CourseCourse list ↗UCC ModuleStudent Group list ↗UCC Module Class DetailsCourse Schedule list ↗UCC Module ScheduleStudent Admission UCC list ↗Shortlisted ApplicantsAcademic Year list ↗
5.2.2

Course Delivery Command Centre

Classroom observation, delivery quality, Teacher performance and learner feedback.

Observations-
Average observation score-
Survey responses-
Classes without observation-

Observation Coverage

Coverage stateModule classes

Observation Type

TypeRecords

Delivery Platform

PlatformRecords

Observation Rating Areas

AreaAverage score

Survey Response Categories

CategoryResponses

Prior Notice

Notice stateRecords

Observation Sign-off

Sign-off stateRecords

Delivery Concerns

Concern stateRecords

Delivery Evidence Records

RecordSourceCourseModuleDateOpen

Management Questions and Data-Based Answers

CriterionQuestionAnswerSource / CalculationStatus
5.2.2

Expanded Course Delivery analytics

Expanded operational checks in platform v1.7.0. Click chart values to inspect underlying records.

Planned versus delivered sessions

Uses scheduled sessions and linked attendance/delivery evidence.

Status / resultCount

Observation coverage by Teacher

Groups observed and unobserved Teachers.

Status / resultCount

Observation coverage by Module

Groups observation records by module.

Status / resultCount

Scheduled versus ad-hoc observations

Uses observation type and schedule-link evidence.

Status / resultCount

Observation sign-off aging

Ages observations that are not fully signed.

Status / resultCount

Observation rating distribution

Groups calculated observation averages into rating bands.

Status / resultCount

Common strengths

Summarises populated strength text fields.

Status / resultCount

Common improvement areas

Summarises populated improvement text fields.

Status / resultCount

Survey response volume

Groups survey response volume by month.

Status / resultCount

Delivery exception queue

Combines missing observation, sign-off, rating, and survey issues.

Status / resultCount

How to read 5.2.2

This dashboard checks whether planned Module delivery occurred with attendance, observation, Teacher acknowledgement, survey feedback and documented follow-up evidence.

Course
UCC display term for ERPNext Program.
Module
UCC display term for ERPNext Course.
Delivery evidence
A scheduled session, attendance record, classroom observation, Teacher sign-off, survey response, intervention or linked operational record.
Observation coverage
Compares Module Class records with linked Classroom Observation records.
Delivery gap
A planned delivery item that lacks attendance, observation, acknowledgement, survey evidence or a readable source.

Status meanings

Good
The check met the configured rule for the selected scope.
Warning
Evidence exists but is incomplete, pending or needs manual confirmation.
Risk
Evidence is missing, overdue or falls below the configured rule.
Unavailable
The dashboard could not confirm a readable source. This is not the same as zero records.

Subpage definitions

Summary
Shows delivery volume, attendance, observations and survey coverage.
Observation
Checks observation type, ratings, concerns, signatures and acknowledgement.
Feedback
Shows Survey Response coverage and question-level response evidence.
Questions
Answers management questions using current delivery and feedback records.

How to verify a result

  1. Open the relevant question, chart Table view or underlying record.
  2. Use the DocType link in the Source column.
  3. Apply the same Course, Module Class, Teacher or date filters.
  4. Confirm the attendance, observation or survey fields named in the source description.

Important: dashboard labels use UCC terminology, while source links retain ERPNext DocType names.

Primary source DocTypes

Program list ↗UCC CourseCourse list ↗UCC ModuleStudent Group list ↗UCC Module Class DetailsCourse Schedule list ↗UCC Module ScheduleStudent Attendance list ↗Classroom Observation list ↗Survey Response list ↗

5.3 Partnerships

Confirmed source: Partnership Agreement. Open Partnership Agreement list ↗ Strategic monitoring and evaluation records are read separately from Partnerships Agreement Management.

Management Questions and Data-Based Answers

CriterionQuestionAnswerSource / CalculationStatus
5.3.1

Partnerships Command Centre

Agreement lifecycle, partner identification, monitoring, risk and evaluation.

Signed agreements-
Active-
Monitoring entries-
Evaluations-

Partnership Status

StatusRecords

Agreement Type

TypeRecords

Agreement Expiry Window

Expiry stateRecords

NDA Completion

NDA stateRecords

Monitoring Method

MethodEntries

Monitoring Type

TypeEntries

Evaluation Outcome

OutcomeEntries

Identification Scores

PartnershipScore

Provider Rating Stage

StageRecords

Selection Threshold

Threshold stateRecords

Partnership Records

AgreementPartyTypeStatusAgreement dateExpiryOpen

Management Questions and Data-Based Answers

CriterionQuestionAnswerSource / CalculationStatus
5.3.1

Expanded Partnership analytics

Expanded operational checks in platform v1.7.0. Click chart values to inspect underlying records.

Agreement lifecycle

Active, expiring, expired, terminated, upcoming, and missing-date agreements.

Status / resultCount

Signature completion

Checks available party and UCC signature evidence.

Status / resultCount

Partnership risk distribution

Uses available risk or score fields; unsupported mappings are shown explicitly.

Status / resultCount

Monitoring frequency and recency

Shows recent, stale, and missing monitoring.

Status / resultCount

Continuation decisions

Groups continue, modify, and terminate outcomes.

Status / resultCount

Missing monitoring or evaluation

Identifies partnerships without monitoring and/or evaluation.

Status / resultCount

Quality-record completeness

Checks agreement, identification, monitoring, evaluation, and rating evidence.

Status / resultCount

How to read 5.3.1

This dashboard checks whether UCC can demonstrate that partnerships are selected, documented, signed, monitored, evaluated, risk-assessed and followed through with continuation, modification or termination decisions.

Partnership Agreement
Signed contractual register for agreement type, partner, dates, signatures, NDA linkage and responsibilities.
Partnerships Agreement Management
Strategic management record for identification criteria, risks, monitoring, evaluation and quality records.
Provider Rating
Provider evaluation source resolved at runtime from the available technical DocType.
Partnership evidence
A signed agreement, NDA, selection rating, risk record, monitoring row, evaluation row or provider assessment.
Partnership gap
A missing signature, date, selection score, risk assessment, monitoring activity, evaluation decision or readable source.

Status meanings

Good
The check met the configured rule for the selected scope.
Warning
Evidence exists but is incomplete, pending or needs manual confirmation.
Risk
Evidence is missing, overdue or falls below the configured rule.
Unavailable
The dashboard could not confirm a readable source. This is not the same as zero records.

Subpage definitions

Summary
Shows agreement volume, lifecycle, NDA and signature completion.
Selection & Risk
Checks partner-identification ratings, total score, risks and supporting justification.
Monitoring & Evaluation
Shows monitoring recency, methods, scores, outcomes and follow-up decisions.
Questions
Answers management questions using confirmed partnership sources.

How to verify a result

  1. Open the relevant question, chart Table view or agreement record.
  2. Use the DocType link in the Source column.
  3. Apply the same partner, agreement type or date filters.
  4. Confirm signatures, dates, ratings, risks and evaluation fields in the source records.

Important: dashboard labels use UCC terminology, while source links retain ERPNext DocType names.

Primary source DocTypes

Partnership Agreement list ↗Partnerships Agreement Management list ↗Supplier Rating list ↗Provider Rating source

Survey Score by Module

Average score parsed from numeric or recognised Likert responses in Survey Response child rows.

Survey Coverage by Type

End of Module, End of Course and Graduate Survey classification based on survey title/category text.

Question-Level Survey Scores

Average score for each scored question in the selected scope.

Open-Ended Responses

Comments and non-numeric responses from End of Module, End of Course and Graduate Survey records.
Survey TypeModuleCategoryQuestionResponseDate

Learning Interventions

At-Risk Indicators

Records

Frontend Diagnostics Log

Build UCC-PLATFORM-1.9.6-20260719 · captures source resolution, requests, fallbacks, rendering, interactions, warnings and errors.

Send the exported CSV or JSON together with a screenshot of the affected card. The export includes build ID, source candidates, resolved DocTypes, request duration, filters, row counts and exact errors. Sensitive-looking keys are redacted.
#TimestampLevelCategoryEventDetails

EDUTRUST CRITERION 3

Criterion 3 · External Recruitment Agents

Live, permission-aware analytics for recruitment-agent selection, appointment, onboarding, evaluation, renewal and offboarding.

Criterion 3 live analytics active.Policy mapping is loading · Permission-aware live foundation
OVERVIEW

Criterion 3 Overview

Criterion 5 framework with policy-aligned live analytics.

Criterion 3 policy set v2 mapped documents

Agent Lifecycle Coverage

Live progression from identification to active representation.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Policy Control Coverage

Live coverage across the two attached Criterion 3 policies.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Agent Control Health

Six-control summary aligned to selection and management requirements.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Renewal and Evaluation Trend

Live trend showing evaluation completion before renewal checkpoints.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Open Exception Profile

Live exceptions requiring SES follow-up.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Management Questions and Data-Based Answers

Live live
CriterionQuestionAnswerSource / CalculationStatus
3.1.1

Selection and Appointment of External Recruitment Agents

Criterion 5 framework with policy-aligned live analytics.

PPD-SES-SL-3.1.1 v1.2

Identification Pathways

The policy allows proactive and reactive entry routes before the same formal screening stage.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Selection and Screening Funnel

Live implementation of the policy's identification, screening, interview and background-check sequence.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Selection Criteria Weighting

Policy weighting from PPD-SES-SL-3.1.1. Values are weights, not live scores.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Selection Score Distribution

Live distribution using the policy's overall performance scale.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Approval and Background Check

Live of approval evidence recorded in the Agent DocType.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Contract and NDA Readiness

Live completeness of appointment documents and contract controls.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Agent Listing and Status

Live status profile after appointment and listing updates.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Management Questions and Data-Based Answers

Live live
CriterionQuestionAnswerSource / CalculationStatus
3.2.1

Management and Evaluation of Recruitment Agents

Criterion 5 framework with policy-aligned live analytics.

PPD-SES-SL-3.2.1 v1.2

Agent Onboarding Funnel

Live onboarding sequence based on the policy's training, records and status controls.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Training Coverage

Live coverage of Recruitment Agent Handbook topics.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Service Delivery Controls

Live evidence coverage for ongoing agent service delivery.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Performance Evaluation Distribution

Live evaluation outcomes before renewal or termination.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Renewal Checkpoint Flow

Live of the fixed June and December renewal checkpoints.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Complaints and Breaches

Live profile for complaints, breaches and investigation outcomes.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Offboarding and Exit Security

Live offboarding path covering status, access, listing and records.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Management Questions and Data-Based Answers

Live live

EDUTRUST CRITERION 6

Criterion 6 · Quality Assurance, Innovation and Continual Improvement

Live, permission-aware analytics for audits, management review, innovation, providers, risk and continual improvement.

Criterion 6 live analytics active.Policy mapping is loading · Permission-aware live foundation
OVERVIEW

Criterion 6 Overview

Criterion 5 framework with policy-aligned live analytics.

Criterion 6 policy set v5 mapped documents

Quality Management Cycle

Live end-to-end quality cycle across the attached Criterion 6 policies.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Policy Evidence Coverage

Live evidence coverage for all five mapped policies.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Quality System Health

Six-domain quality-system overview.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Quality Calendar Completion

Live completion trend for scheduled quality activities.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Action Status

Live corrective, preventive and improvement-action status.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Source Readiness

Live source and evidence readiness.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Management Questions and Data-Based Answers

Live live
CriterionQuestionAnswerSource / CalculationStatus
6.1.1

Internal Assessment and Quality Audits

Criterion 5 framework with policy-aligned live analytics.

PPD-SGL-SQ-6.1.1 v1.2

Annual Audit Programme

Live annual audit programme covering routine, surveillance, renewal and ad-hoc audits.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Audit Scope Coverage

Live coverage of the policy's audit scope and methodology.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Audit Lifecycle

Live audit process from schedule to verified follow-up.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Auditor Qualification and Independence

Live controls for qualified and independent auditors.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Audit Findings by Severity

Live findings profile.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Corrective Action Closure

Live CAP progression and follow-up verification.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Management Questions and Data-Based Answers

Live live
CriterionQuestionAnswerSource / CalculationStatus
6.2.1

Management Review

Criterion 5 framework with policy-aligned live analytics.

PPD-SGL-SQ-6.2.1 v1.3

THESIS Review Coverage

Live coverage of the THESIS framework required by the policy.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Management Review Preparation

Live of annual planning, invitations, inputs and approval.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Review Input Completeness

Live completeness of management-review inputs.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Review Outputs

Live decisions and actions arising from Management Review.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Action Ageing

Live ageing of Quality Action records from Management Review.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Action Effectiveness

Live follow-up at the subsequent review.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Management Questions and Data-Based Answers

Live live
CriterionQuestionAnswerSource / CalculationStatus
6.3.1

Innovation and Continual Improvement

Criterion 5 framework with policy-aligned live analytics.

PPD-SGL-SQ-6.3.1 v1.2

Innovation Type Mix

Live mix using the four innovation types defined in the policy.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Improvement Initiative Lifecycle

Live progression through Quality Action planning, approval, implementation and validation.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Innovation Performance Categories

Live of the policy's six innovation-performance categories.

MeasureLive valueStatus

QIPI Outcome Trend

Live Quality and Innovation Performance Index trend.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Before and After Impact

Live normalized improvement result; final live calculation must use approved QIPI data.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Improvement Action Status

Live evidence coverage across the improvement procedure.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Management Questions and Data-Based Answers

Live live
CriterionQuestionAnswerSource / CalculationStatus
6.4.1

Provider's Accreditation and Evaluation

Criterion 5 framework with policy-aligned live analytics.

PPD-OE-FN-6.4.1 v1.2

Provider Tier Profile

Live provider distribution by proportional risk and compliance tier.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Provider Accreditation Funnel

Live selection, screening, risk assessment and approval sequence.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Compliance Package

Live completeness of tier-based onboarding controls.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Service Delivery and Purchase Controls

Live procurement and delivery-control sequence.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Provider Rating Weighting

Policy weighting from PPD-OE-FN-6.4.1. Values are weights, not live ratings.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Provider Evaluation Outcomes

Live annual performance-evaluation outcomes.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Management Questions and Data-Based Answers

Live live
CriterionQuestionAnswerSource / CalculationStatus
6.5.3

Hazard Identification and Risk Assessment

Criterion 5 framework with policy-aligned live analytics.

PPD-SGL-SQ-6.5.3 v1.2

Hazard Reporting Funnel

Live flow from Helpdesk-Ticket submission to risk closure.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Risk Level Distribution

Live distribution using the policy's risk-index bands.

MeasureLive valueStatus

5×5 Risk Matrix

Policy-aligned likelihood × severity matrix. Numbers are risk-index values.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Risk Treatment Lifecycle

Live medium/high-risk investigation and treatment sequence.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Residual Risk Trend

Live reduction from initial to residual risk.

MeasureLive valueStatus

Business Continuity Readiness

Live of business continuity and disaster recovery readiness.

MeasureLive valueStatus

SOURCES

Display sourcePurposeStatusRecords
DIAGRAM EXPLORER

Find live diagrams without opening another dashboard page

Search all Criterion 1–7 visual catalogues. Criteria 1, 2, 3, 6 and 7 use permission-aware live API foundations; Criteria 4 and 5 retain their established live implementations.

Criterion 10live visuals
Criterion 20live visuals
Criterion 30live visuals
Criterion 40live visuals
Criterion 50live visuals
Criterion 60live visuals
Criterion 70live visuals
Available diagramsScanning platform…
Live
1
Choose the dashboard

Use the existing Criterion selector in the top bar.

2
Search or filter

The catalogue is generated from the real chart elements, so future diagrams appear automatically.

3
Open the live card

One click takes you to the original analytics card. No duplicate rendering logic or copied data.

Why this approach scales

Explore is a fast index over the existing dashboards—not a second dashboard system. Criterion-specific calculations, D3 renderers, tables, exports and record links remain in their original tested components.

🔎AI optional

Ask about students, courses, modules, assessments, classes, leave and graduation.

Student Journey is active.
2
FIND STUDENT

Select a record

Pinned student
Not selected
⌕
Recent students
3
GUIDED QUESTIONS

Choose what to check

4
ASK UCC RESULT

Review the result

AI
Ready to review

Select a record, then choose a guided question.

ERPNext evidence, tables, warnings and optional AI interpretation will appear here.

Optional future AI mode

Guided ERPNext questions extract records without OpenAI. Add an OpenAI API key only when free-form AI interpretation is enabled.

The key is kept only in this browser session and is used only for an optional free-form AI request.
UCC Intelligence Platform

Version v1.9.6

v1.9.6

Fixed the frontend startup sequence so a stale cached HTML or JavaScript build shows a deployment warning without stopping Sophia. View tools, visual navigation and Source Mapping Report now continue initialising.

v1.9.5

Fixed scoped Source Mapping Report styling and actions, restored exact subcriterion visual catalogues, prevented slow API responses from being misclassified as blank diagrams, and aligned Criterion 1 and 2 source mappings to the confirmed UCC DocTypes.

v1.9.4

Restored universal hover visual menus across Criteria 1–7, standardised Diagram/Table controls to the Criterion 5 design, repaired View tools, and added source mapping plus invalid-visual diagnostics.

v1.9.3

Removed the global Visual Navigator and replaced Criterion 5 with compact parent tabs that reveal their child subcriteria on hover, focus or keyboard interaction.

v1.9.2

Fixed the visual navigator runtime scope and corrected Criterion 5/live-section discovery.

v1.9.1

Added a persistent visual navigator with criterion and subcriterion tabs, chart search, chart counts, jump-to-visual controls and remembered section state.

v1.9.0

Expanded Criteria 1, 2, 3, 4, 6 and 7 to Criterion 5-level visual depth using live metrics, readiness, exceptions, record drill-downs and source-list links.

v1.8.9

Added scroll-to-top criterion switching, persistent single-row submenus, universal management-question actions, Provider Rating fallback resolution, and expanded live diagrams with Diagram/Table drill-downs.

v1.8.8

Connected Criteria 1, 2, 3, 6 and 7 to permission-aware APIs, added policy registries for Criteria 1, 2 and 7, and moved the navigation arrow into the single-row header.

v1.8.8

Added permission-aware Criterion 3 and Criterion 6 Server Script foundations. Their current dashboard views remain preview-only until frontend integration is completed.

v1.8.4

Unified every criterion hero and action card with the Criterion 5 framework, fixed View tools, expanded Criterion 4 live diagrams, and rebuilt policy-driven Criterion 3 and 6 previews.

v1.8.3

Replaced scroll-based navigation with a manual arrow control, added a Criterion 5 readiness strip, and rebuilt Criteria 1–3 and 6–7 as full Criterion 5-style dummy dashboards.

v1.8.2

Kept the navigation inside the Custom HTML Block, removed the detached raw-HTML failure, consolidated active CSS and documentation, removed points from visible labels, and clarified placeholder Explore states.

v1.8.1

Fixed compact navigation, Explore search and clear controls, View tools, text contrast and dashboard typography. Added Criteria 1–7 catalogue text and placeholder panels for Criteria 1–3 and 6–7.

v1.8.0

Added the Explore workspace as a searchable index over every live Criterion 4 and Criterion 5 visual, while retaining the existing Analytics and role-first Ask UCC workflows.

v1.7.0

Activated Criterion 4 runtime DocType and field mapping, permission-aware KPIs and drill-downs, and aligned its controls with Criterion 5.

v1.2.0

Added Criterion 4 policy-led pages, compact navigation, view tools, and duplicate-toggle corrections.

v1.1.0

Expanded Criterion 5 subcriteria and added universal interactions, persisted view state, exports, filtered links, and explicit empty states.
